data.title: Guzu no Soko
data.synopsis:
From that day an anxiety started to root in the man's room. He just keeps walking not to sink in listlessness. This is a document to reflect my own anxiety arisen after the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear disaster.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

data.title: Kenkou Takarabune Sukoyaka 7
data.synopsis:
The self-described "slightly surreal masterpiece anime" follows the "Sukoyaka 7," a group based on the Seven Lucky Gods of Japanese mythology. The anime explains issues related to Japan's health insurance system in a comedic way.

(Source: ANN)
